examples: She swayed giddily across the dance floor.
But when it's as exciting and giddily joyful as Super Mario Galaxy was, it's a little hard not to get overexcited anyway.
It is tough, when you are giddily falling in love, to stand back and really examine your relationship with objective eyes, but we knew we had to.
The hotel's 770 guest rooms range in luxury level from exceedingly comfortable to giddily baronial.
People wander giddily from rollercoaster to rocket, patiently queuing for the next thrill.
